stories.title: Four AUSL Stars Head to MLB All-Star Week — Softball Takes the Philadelphia Stage
stories.angle: Softball gets a prime-time MLB All-Star Week slot — a co-ed showcase putting the sport's biggest names in front of baseball's biggest audience.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Softball just booked a prime-time slot at MLB All-Star Week.

Canady. Garcia. Jennings. Brito.

Four @theAUSL stars anchor teams in MLBx: All-Star 3-on-3 this Sunday at Citizens Bank Park.

Softball's biggest moment at baseball's biggest event. 🥎

#AUSL #Softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The MLBx All-Star 3-on-3 matchups are set:

🥎 NiJaCanady → Team Chipper Jones
🥎 Rachel Garcia → Team Shane Victorino
🥎 Tiare Jennings → Team Jimmy Rollins
🥎 Alyssa Brito → Team Ryan Howard

Sunday. Citizens Bank Park. Philadelphia.

This is huge for softball. #AUSL #Softball

article.headline: Softball Takes the MLB All-Star Stage: Four AUSL Stars Head to Philadelphia

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Four AUSL Stars Head to MLB All-Star Week

**Image Concept 1A — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** Graphic collage / announcement card
- **Concept:** Split-panel image showing all four players — Canady, Garcia, Jennings, Brito — in action shots on the softball diamond. Top overlay text: "SOFTBALL INVADES ALL-STAR WEEK." Bottom: "July 12 · Citizens Bank Park · MLBx All-Star 3-on-3." Brand colors + I Love Softball logo.
- **Imagn search terms:** "NiJaree Canady Texas Volts" / "Rachel Garcia Texas Volts" / "Tiare Jennings Texas Volts" / "Alyssa Brito Carolina Blaze"
- **Mode:** Canva composition
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 1B — Article Hero (1200x630)**
- **Type:** Wide landscape editorial
- **Concept:** The Citizens Bank Park field with a softball graphic element and "AUSL AT ALL-STAR WEEK" text overlay. Or a tight action shot of one player (Garcia or Canady) with stadium-light feel.
- **Imagn search terms:** "Rachel Garcia Texas Volts"
- **Mode:** Canva composition
- **Status:** not_started

stories.title: Hallie Burns Commits to Baylor — Southland POY Heads to Big 12
stories.angle: Big 12 upgrade — a dominant mid-major ace moves up to prove she can handle top competition.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Big 12 just got a big arm.

Hallie Burns — 2026 Southland Pitcher of the Year — is headed to Baylor.

20-5 record. 1.68 ERA. 112.2 innings.

No. 1 in the country in hits per 7 innings. Top 5 in WHIP.

Baylor wins the portal. @BaylorSoftball

#Softball #SoftballTransferPortal

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Hallie Burns grew up in Booneville, Mississippi.

Led her town to back-to-back state titles. Then led SLU to their first conference title and NCAA Tournament.

Now she's in the Big 12 at Baylor.

The journey is just getting started. @BaylorSoftball #Softball

article.headline: Hallie Burns Heads to Baylor: The Southland's Best Pitcher Is Now a Big 12 Bear

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Hallie Burns to Baylor

**Image Concept 2A — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** Transfer announcement card
- **Concept:** Split image — Southeastern Louisiana jersey on left / Baylor green and gold on right with "COMMITTED" stamp in the center. Player name, key stats (20-5 · 1.68 ERA · Southland POY) and Baylor wordmark.
- **Imagn search terms:** "Hallie Burns Southeastern Louisiana"
- **Mode:** Canva composition
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 2B — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** Stats card
- **Concept:** Dark background with Baylor's stadium silhouette. Large white numbers: "20-5 / 1.68 ERA / No. 1 in the country." Smaller text: "Welcome to Waco, Hallie Burns." Baylor logos.
- **Imagn search terms:** "Hallie Burns Southeastern Louisiana"
- **Mode:** Canva stats graphic
- **Status:** not_started

stories.title: Megan Grant ESPYS — 7 Days to Vote, Final Stretch Push
stories.angle: Final week urgency — "7 days left" is the most persuasive call-to-action, and the underdog framing (softball vs. NFL/Olympic names) drives community action.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
7 days. One vote per day.

Megan Grant broke a 31-year NCAA record with 42 home runs.

She's up for Best Record-Breaking Performance at the ESPYs — against NFL, marathon, and Olympic names.

Softball needs to show up. Vote at ESPN.com before July 15.

#Softball #ESPYs

article.headline: Seven Days Left: The Softball World Must Vote for Megan Grant at the ESPYs

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Megan Grant ESPYS — 7 Days

**Image Concept 3A — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** Countdown call-to-action card
- **Concept:** Bold "7 DAYS" in massive text at top. Megan Grant at-bat action shot. Text: "Vote Megan Grant for Best Record-Breaking Performance at the ESPYs. ESPN.com · Once per day · through July 15." I Love Softball logo and ESPY graphic element.
- **Imagn search terms:** "Megan Grant Portland Cascade" OR "Megan Grant UCLA"
- **Mode:** Canva composition
- **Status:** not_started

**Image Concept 3B — Social (1080x1350)**
- **Type:** Record graphic
- **Concept:** "42 HOME RUNS" in huge font breaking through the image (cracked-glass or explosion effect). "1995 → 2026. The record stood for 31 years. Now it's hers." Megan Grant photo, UCLA/Cascade colors.
- **Imagn search terms:** "Megan Grant UCLA"
- **Mode:** Canva design with text effect
- **Status:** not_started

stories.title: Canady's Philadelphia Stage — Can MLBx Be the "OG NiJa" Moment?
stories.angle: The nation gets to see "OG NiJa" as an athlete, not just through the lens of her current pitching slump.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
This Sunday at Citizens Bank Park, NiJaree Canady won't be on the mound.

She'll be IN the box.

MLBx: All-Star 3-on-3 is a power-hitting showcase — and the nation is about to see why everyone fell in love with "OG NiJa."

4 days. #AUSL #NiJaCanady #Softball

article.headline: OG NiJa at Citizens Bank Park: Why Canady's MLBx Moment Is Bigger Than a Stats Line

stories.title: PGF Nationals Now 11 Days Out — Roster Freeze Thursday
stories.angle: Coaches and 18U families are in final preparation mode — roster lock is the near-term pressure point.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Coaches: the roster freeze for PGF Nationals is THIS Thursday (July 13).

11 days until Great Park, Irvine.

Final additions before the lock. After July 13, your roster is set.

Is your team ready? #PGFNationals #Softball #18USoftball

article.headline: PGF Nationals in 11 Days: What Coaches and Families Need to Know Before Thursday's Roster Freeze
